title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Cash & Carry - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Metro Cash & Carry in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Metro Cash & Carry:
Metro Cash & Carry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
